text.title: ops-tax-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-tax-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Founder assumes the simplified home-office deduction method and the actual method can both be applied in the same year.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Only one method can be used per year. Switching methods annually is allowed but requires full recalculation. Applying both double-deducts.

failure-mode.description: Agent hardcodes 2024 contribution limits (Solo 401k 22.5K, SEP-IRA 66K, HSA 4,150/8,300) without flagging the year.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Contribution limits are indexed to inflation and change annually. Hardcoded limits produce wrong advice after the tax year changes.
